title: Audit Log Entry
description: Local on-device journal entry written by privacy / consent flows: erasure receipts, replay-export sanitization decisions, policy acceptance, analytics opt-in toggles. Persisted in IndexedDB `hr-profile.audit` per `data-inventory.md`. The full journal is wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`.

type.description: Closed entry type. `ERASURE` records a `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA` invocation. `REPLAY_EXPORT` records a save/replay export sanitization decision. `POLICY_ACCEPTED` records a privacy-policy acceptance. `OPT_IN_TOGGLED` records every analytics / mature-content / display-name-mode flip.

performedAt.description: ISO 8601. Wall-clock at the moment of the recorded action; never used for gameplay determinism.

errorId.description: Optional. Set when the entry is correlated with a thrown error so support can match the on-device crash log.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 of the affected payload at the moment of the action. For `ERASURE`, the digest of the cleared inventory rows; for `REPLAY_EXPORT`, the digest of the exported file.

policyVersion.description: Required for `POLICY_ACCEPTED`; mirrors the top-of-file `policyVersion` in `docs/architecture/privacy.md`.

toggleValue.description: Required for `OPT_IN_TOGGLED`. Booleans for analytics / mature-content; the new mode string for display-name-mode.

erasureRequestId.description: UUID v4 paired with the corresponding `erasure-receipt.schema.json` row when `type == "ERASURE"`.

signalingSessionId.description: Optional. Carried only when `type == "ERASURE"` and the user was in an active multiplayer session. The signaling session id is opaque (CSPRNG-minted) and never contains a peer IP.
